svg.title: Role-Based Prompting – LinkedIn post
svg.desc: A square LinkedIn post explaining role-based prompting with persona cards, a visual comparison, and the ABTalks 60-Day Claude AI Mastery Challenge branding.
svg.text: Turn Claude into Any Expert You Need
"You are a startup COO who scaled teams…"
• Hire Chief of Staff before managers
• Assign squads to outcomes, not titles
"You are a senior UX designer. Review my app onboarding flow."
Day 07 of 60 · Claude AI Mastery Challenge
